question.text: The facility for migration of VCFs to SEBI (AIF) Regulations is available till:

explanation.text: **The Logic:** The facility of migration from SEBI (VCF) Regulations 1996 to SEBI (AIF) Regulations 2012 is available only till July 19, 2025 as per SEBI circular dated August 19, 2024. After this date, unregistered VCFs cannot migrate. **The Trap:** This is a time-sensitive regulatory provision. The deadline has been extended from earlier dates but is now fixed. Migrated VCF schemes whose liquidation period expired get an additional liquidation period till July 19, 2026. **Cross-Exam Context:** Specific dates and deadlines in SEBI regulations are frequently tested in XIX-A. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** If you're working with any fund that was originally registered as a VCF under the 1996 regulations, ensure it has completed the migration process before the July 2025 deadline. Post-deadline, operating without migration could have regulatory consequences.
